AngularTS
    Preparing search index...
    • AttributesService

    Interface AttributesService

    interface AttributesService {
        addClass(
            element: Node | Element | null | undefined,
            classValue: string,
        ): void;
        has(
            element: Node | Element | null | undefined,
            normalizedName: string,
        ): boolean;
        observe(
            scope: Scope | null | undefined,
            element: Node | Element | null | undefined,
            normalizedName: string,
            callback: AttributeObserverCallback,
        ): () => void;
        originalName(
            element: Node | Element | null | undefined,
            normalizedName: string,
        ): string | undefined;
        read(
            element: Node | Element | null | undefined,
            normalizedName: string,
        ): string | undefined;
        removeClass(
            element: Node | Element | null | undefined,
            classValue: string,
        ): void;
        set(
            element: Node | Element | null | undefined,
            normalizedName: string,
            value: AttributeSetValue,
            options?: AttributesSetOptions,
        ): void;
        updateClass(
            element: Node | Element | null | undefined,
            newClasses: string,
            oldClasses: string,
        ): void;
    }
    Index

    addClass has observe originalName read removeClass set updateClass
